title: Spicy German Pappardelle Pasta
description: A spicy twist on traditional German pasta dishes, combining chewy sausage with peppery flavors.
instructions: Cook the pappardelle pasta according to package directions.
In a large skillet, cook the German bacon over medium-high heat until crispy.
Add the peppery sausage to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the garlic, chili flakes, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked pappardelle pasta to the skillet and toss with the sausage and bacon mixture.
Serve hot, topped with additional chili flakes if desired.
